section.heading: Insurance rates; report to Congress
section.chapeau: The Federal supervisory agencies shall consult with

paragraph.content: insurers furnishing insurance protection against losses resulting from robberies, burglaries, and larcenies committed against financial institutions referred to in section 1881 of this title, and
State agencies having supervisory or regulatory responsibilities with respect to such insurers

section.continuation: to determine the feasibility and desirability of premium rate differentials based on the installation, maintenance, and operation of security devices and procedures. The Federal supervisory agencies shall report to the Congress the results of their consultations pursuant to this section not later than two years after July 7, 1968.
